presets.label: Betrayal & revenge
presets.hint: trusted partner backstabs, victim plots quiet payback

presets.label: Underdog rises
presets.hint: the one nobody believed in becomes the one everyone needs

presets.label: Lost child reunion
presets.hint: separated family finds each other against the odds

presets.label: Bullied to vindicated
presets.hint: kid mocked at school proves everyone wrong

presets.label: Boss humiliates employee
presets.hint: arrogant boss fires worker who later succeeds, boss begs back

presets.label: Single parent sacrifice
presets.hint: parent gives up everything for their kids' chance

presets.label: Winning the lottery
presets.hint: sudden fortune reveals who really cared all along

presets.label: Sibling rivalry
presets.hint: two siblings clash, then realize they need each other

presets.label: Long-lost friend returns
presets.hint: old friend shows up at the worst/best possible moment

presets.label: Wrongly accused
presets.hint: someone framed for something they didn't do, then proven innocent

presets.label: Couple breakup & makeup
presets.hint: fight that nearly ends it all, then a quiet reconciliation

presets.label: Elder passes the torch
presets.hint: wise old character mentors a young one before stepping aside

presets.label: Disaster survival
presets.hint: family or strangers band together against a sudden catastrophe

presets.label: Hidden secret revealed
presets.hint: long-buried truth comes out, changes everyone's relationships

presets.label: Rags to riches
presets.hint: poor character builds something real and quietly succeeds
